headline: Wedbush Raises PT on Palo Alto Networks (PANW)
summary: With more than 65% gains in May 2026, Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (NASDAQ:PANW) is one of the Best Performing Stocks in May. Recently, on June 3, Wedbush raised the price target on the stock from $300 to $340 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. ​The rating follows Palo Alto Networks, Inc.
